chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Month of Ramadan and the Reward of Fasting in it

text: 1835 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فَازُوا وَ اَللَّهِ بِجَوَائِزَ لَيْسَتْ كَجَوَائِزِ اَلْعِبَادِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1835 - Abu Abdullah (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as)) said:
"By Allah (swt), they have succeeded with rewards that are unlike the rewards given by the servants."
